title: lupinus pusillus var. pusillus
intro: Lupinus pusillus var. pusillus, also known as the dwarf lupine or ground lupine, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lupinus pusillus var. pusillus include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
